codeReview.summary: The commit correctly updates copy and adds CIA/animal-control demo prefill functions, but it places the new demo buttons inside `#query-form`, which remains hidden (`display:none`) until authentication. This violates the feature/validation requirement that demo buttons are visible on the page.

issues.description: Demo buttons are nested in `<div id="query-form" style="display:none...">`, so they are not visible on initial page load. Validation contract VAL-FE-002 explicitly fails when demo buttons are hidden/invisible, and expected behavior requires visible CIA/animal-control demo buttons.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `fullstack-worker` skill's frontend verification guidance emphasizes HTML well-formedness and unit tests but does not require checking initial UI visibility/state-dependent behavior. This likely allowed hidden demo buttons to pass worker self-verification despite VAL-FE-002 requiring visibility.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md step 5 says for frontend to verify HTML is well-formed; worker transcript skeleton for session b2cae96a-aabf-4b0c-acf2-9b726e9f5df8 shows grep/static checks only and no interactive visibility check.

summary: Review failed with one blocking issue: the new demo buttons are implemented but not visible before login because they are inside a hidden query form.
